# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: LinkerdInstall
metadata:
  name: install-linkerd-controlplane-gateway
spec:

  version: "" # default is latest stable version
  namespace: gateway
  controlPlaneNamespace: "gateway" # defaults to "controller-runtime" namespace. Can be omitted if using the Gateway mode.
  proxyImage: "docker.io/bitnami/kubectl:1.24.7" # optional, defaults to "quay.io/linkerd/proxy"
  proxyInitContainerImage: ""  # optional, defaults to "quay.io/linkerd/init-container" (for init containers like the Prometheus probes).
  enableIdentity: true

  installNamespaceResourceQuota:
    enabled: false
    requestsCpu:
      default: 10m
      minimum: 50m
      maximum: 200m

    limitsMemory:
      default: "4Mi" # 4 MiB
      minimum: "4Mi"
      maximum: "8Mi"

  enableGateway: true
  gatewayNamespaceResourceQuota:
    enabled: false
    requestsCpu:
      default: 10m
      minimum: 50m
      maximum: 200m

    limitsMemory:
      default: "32Mi" # 4 MiB
      minimum: "32Mi"
      maximum: "64Mi"
  injectibleNamespaces:
    enabled: true

  enablePolicy: false

{{< /text >}}
